sample.selection: all articles with first_seen_at in the half-open UTC interval

titleInput.normalization: HTML5 entity decode; Unicode NFKC; collapse Unicode whitespace to U+0020; trim; preserve case and punctuation
titleInput.hash: lowercase hexadecimal SHA-256 of UTF-8 normalized title

topDuplicates: one person made decision to rescind balogun's red card, suspension: report
cdc issues health alert as cases of diarrhea from parasite explode to 7,000
targeted news service
how to listen to third place world cup game between france and england
newly retired couples could lose $17,000 a year in social security in 2033
popular toaster ovens recalled due to shock, fire risk
tourist hospitalized after bison tossed him into the air at yellowstone
mercedes driver knocked out in wild street brawl with skateboarder
ariana grande stokes rekindled romance rumors with ex after lyric change
murder of ann widdecombe being investigated as potential act of terrorism
how to listen to the fifa world cup 2026 final halftime show
writer is paid 5.6 million dollars in trump sexual abuse and defamation case
blunt-force trauma caused death of mother and children in home
three found dead in family home in ballymena
outbreak of diarrhea from parasite continues to spread, tops 3,000 cases
trump to present world cup trophy with fifa president
trump backs down over threat to levy tolls on shipping in strait of hormuz
firefighters continue battling major wildfire in cairngorms
justin moore opens up about sobriety journey: 'drinking got out of control'
e. jean carroll receives $5 million payment from trump for civil suit

sample.method: lowest 4000 url_hash values plus all labeled articles
